projects.title: AI Content Systems at Intuit
projects.tagline: Designing AI-assisted content infrastructure to scale clarity, consistency, and access
projects.summary: Built an AI-assisted content system that structured ~4,000 help articles, enabling faster authoring, consistent reuse, and expanded access for support teams.

projects.title: Lacerte Forms Help
projects.tagline: Designing in-product, form-level guidance within a regulated tax environment
projects.summary: Designed preventative content layer for thousands of tax forms, reducing errors and support dependency through contextual guidance at moment of need.

projects.title: CGI Meditation Experiences
projects.tagline: VR meditation app designed to enhance remote worker well-being
projects.summary: Created concept, pitch, and demo for a VR meditation app that integrates with work calendars. Won first place in CGI's VR innovation challenge, beating all competing teams.

projects.title: UX/UI Work for Telecom
projects.tagline: Enterprise B2B platform design for multi-location service management
projects.summary: Designed UX content for complex B2B platforms supporting enterprise customers with multi-location telecommunications service needs. Confidential work subject to NDA.

projects.title: New Engagement Sales Support
projects.tagline: Strategic marketing content and proposals to win enterprise clients
projects.summary: Designed strategic marketing content and pitch decks for CGI's business development efforts. Created compelling narratives that showcased services and value to prospective enterprise clients.
